Frequently Asked Questions
1. UP DGMHUP ANM Training Online Form Start Date?
The online application process started on 01 July 2026.
2. UP DGMHUP ANM Training Merit List?
The Merit list will be released As Per Schedule .
3. Where can I find the College List for the UP DGMHUP ANM Training Admission?
The detailed of College List and Admission scheme for the UP DGMHUP ANM Training Admission are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete syllabus details.
4. UP DGMHUP ANM Training Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
5. UP DGMHUP ANM Training Admission Last Date?
The last date to apply online is 31 July 2026.
6. What is the last date to Update application fee Details?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 31 July 2026 .
7. How can I apply for UP DGMHUP ANM Training Admission?
Candidates can apply online through the official recruitment link available on SarkariResult.com (Since 2012) – Official Website of Sarkari Result .
tables: Uttar Pradesh UP DGMHUP ANM Training Program Admissions 2026

Uttar Pradesh Department of Medical Health & Family Welfare has released the advertisement of UP ANM Training Admissions 2026. All the candidates who want to apply in this UP ANM Training Programme can Download Shortlisted Candidate List. See advertisement for other admissions related information like syllabus, qualification, age limit, selection procedure.

Uttar Pradesh Department of Medical Health & Family Welfare UP DGMHUP ANM Training Online Registration 2026 Uttar Pradesh DGMHUP ANM Training 2026 : Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® : SarkariResult.Com Official Since : 201 2
Important Dates Application Begin : 01 /07/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 31/07/2026 Pay Exam Fee Last Date : 31/07/2026 Merit List : As per Schedule
Application Fee General : 200/- OBC / SC / ST : 100/- Pay the Fee Through UPI, Debit Card, Credit Card and Net Banking Mode Only.
UP DGMHUP ANM Training Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 31/12/2025 Minimum Age : 17 Years. Maximum Age : 35 Years. Age Relaxation As per NHM UP ANM Training Post Admission Rule.
UP DGMHUP ANM Training Admission 2026 : Admission Details Total : 1800 Post
UP DGMHUP ANM Training Admission Eligibility
Only for Female Candidate. 10+2 Intermediate in Any Recognized Board in India. General/ OBC / EWS : 45% Marks. SC / ST : 40% Marks More Details Read the Notification.
